mapper.select: SELECT address_index FROM t_wallet_address WHERE chain = #{chain} ORDER BY address_index DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_wallet_address ( id, user_id, chain, address, address_index, status, assigned_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{chain}, #{address}, #{addressIndex}, #{statusCode}, #{assignedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_wallet_address SET address = #{address}, address_index = #{addressIndex}, status = #{statusCode}, assigned_at = #{assignedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
